memoryArtifacts.headline: Euphemia of Kuyavia
memoryArtifacts.description:
Euphemia of Kuyavia (c. 1265 – March 18, 1308 [1]) was a Kuyavian princess, she was Queen consort of Galicia-Volhynia.

She was the daughter of Casimir I of Kuyavia by his third wife Euphrosyne, daugh …

zh.Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Lipno County, Bydgosz: 波蘭白德格斯吉波維亞特 利普諾福斯吉多布日n 納德 維武a
zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Eufemia of Kujavia於大約1267年出生在波蘭庫亞福斯可-波莫斯吉利普諾福斯吉多布日n 納德 維武a時，她的父親Kazimierz I kujawski Piast58歲，母親Eufrozyna Piast40歲。她於大約1287年與Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik在波蘭白德格斯吉波維亞特 利普諾福斯吉多布日n 納德 維武a結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1308年3月18日享年42歲。

zh-hans.Inowrocław, Inowrocław, Kujawsko-pomorsk: 波兰庫亞福斯可-波莫斯吉易諾萊瓦福易諾萊瓦福

zh-hans.Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Lipno, Kuyavia-Pomera: 波兰庫亞福斯可-波莫斯吉利普諾福斯吉多布日n 納德 維武a
zh-hans.Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Lipno County, Bydgosz: 波兰白德格斯吉波維亞特 利普諾福斯吉多布日n 納德 維武a
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess Eufemia of Kujavia于大约1267年出生在波兰庫亞福斯可-波莫斯吉利普諾福斯吉多布日n 納德 維武a时，她的父亲Kazimierz I kujawski Piast58岁，母亲Eufrozyna Piast40岁。她于大约1287年与Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik在波兰白德格斯吉波維亞特 利普諾福斯吉多布日n 納德 維武a结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1308年3月18日享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Eufemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Eufemia of Kujavia was born about 1267, in Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Lipno, Kuyavia-Pomerania, Poland, her father, Kazimierz I kujawski Piast, was 58 and her mother, Eufrozyna Piast, was 40. She married Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik about 1287, in Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Lipno County, Bydgoszcz, Poland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 18 March 1308, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess Eufemia of Kujavia est née environ 1267, à Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Lipnowski, kujawsko-pomorskie, Pologne, son père, Kazimierz I kujawski Piast, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Eufrozyna Piast, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik environ 1287, à Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Powiat lipnowski, bydgoskie, Pologne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 mars 1308, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess Eufemia of Kujavia um 1267 in Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Lipnowski, kujawsko-pomorskie, Polen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Kazimierz I kujawski Piast 58 und ihre Mutter Eufrozyna Piast 40. Sie hat um 1287 in Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Powiat lipnowski, bydgoskie, Polen Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. März 1308 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Eufemia of Kujavia è nata il circa 1267 nel Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Lipnowski, kujawsko-pomorskie, Polonia, sua padre, Kazimierz I kujawski Piast, aveva 58 anni e sua madre, Eufrozyna Piast, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik circa 1287, nel Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Powiat lipnowski, bydgoskie, Polonia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 marzo 1308, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Princess Eufemia of Kujaviaが約1267年にポーランドクジャウスコ-プオモースキリプノウスキドブルズイn ナド ウィスlaで生まれた時，父Kazimierz I kujawski Piastは58歳，母Eufrozyna Piastは40歳であった。約1287年にポーランドブイドゴスキポウィアト リプノウスキドブルズイn ナド ウィスlaでGrand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurikと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1308年3月18日に42歳で死去した。

ko.Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Lipno, Kuyavia-Pomera: 폴란드 쿠자w스코-폼르스키 리p노우스키 도브르즈이n 네아드 와이스la
ko.Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Lipno County, Bydgosz: 폴란드 비지스키 파위앳 리p노우스키 도브르즈이n 네아드 와이스la
ko.lifeSummary: Princess Eufemia of Kujavia(이)가 대략 1267년 폴란드 쿠자w스코-폼르스키 리p노우스키 도브르즈이n 네아드 와이스la에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Kazimierz I kujawski Piast(은)는 58세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eufrozyna Piast(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1287년 폴란드 비지스키 파위앳 리p노우스키 도브르즈이n 네아드 와이스la에서 Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1308년 3월 18일 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Eufemia of Kujavia nasceu aproximadamente 1267, em Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Lipnowski, kujawsko-pomorskie, Polônia, seu pai, Kazimierz I kujawski Piast, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Eufrozyna Piast, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik aproximadamente 1287, em Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Powiat lipnowski, bydgoskie, Polônia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de março de 1308, com 42 anos.

ru.Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Lipno County, Bydgosz: добрзиn над висla, поуят липноуски, биджоски, Польша
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Eufemia of Kujavia родилась около 1267 г. в местности добрзиn над висla, липноуски, куджавско-поморски, Польша, её отцу по имени Kazimierz I kujawski Piast было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Eufrozyna Piast, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik около 1287 г. в местности добрзиn над висla, поуят липноуски, биджоски, Польша. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 марта 1308 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princess Eufemia of Kujavia nació aproximadamente 1267, en Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Lipnowski, kujawsko-pomorskie, Polonia, su papá, Kazimierz I kujawski Piast, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Eufrozyna Piast, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik aproximadamente 1287, en Dobrzyń nad Wisłą, Powiat lipnowski, bydgoskie, Polonia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1308, a la edad de 42 años.
